title: Puducherry Assembly Elections: BJP Releases Election Manifesto; Promises LPG Cylinders, 'Pink Autos', E-Scooters
description: For women voters, the BJP has proposed a “Pink Autos Initiative” which includes subsidies of up to Rs 50,000 and free driving training. Similarly, the ‘Anbu Thangai Thittam’ promises to provide e-scooters to meritorious Class 12th girl students.
